steps: dnd-build is the relevant skill for creating a character, but it only supports level-1 characters. A level-5 build is beyond its current scope.

Subclasses (including the Beast Master) are chosen at level 3 in D&D 2024, and level-5 features (e.g., Extra Attack) are also unmodelled at level 1, so a level-5 Beast Master Ranger cannot be produced here (Manquant documentaire for anything above level 1).
What I can do: build a legal level-1 Ranger now (species, background, ability scores, skills, level-1 spells) that you could later advance toward Beast Master at level 3.
